request_payload.exposure_text: Strategic autonomy isn't about isolation - it's about ensuring our allies can't be blackmailed. Look at how China's leveraging rare earth supply chains to pressure Taiwan. We need domestic production for critical tech, not just for us but to protect our partners. The alternative is letting Beijing dictate terms to the whole region. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
